notes:
- Recorda-style update banner: in-app progress strip while the new installer downloads
- After download completes, banner shows 'Install now / Later' buttons
- 'Install now' fires the silent installer immediately (matata closes, files swap, matata relaunches)
- 'Later' keeps the staged file; install fires on next quit (WM_DESTROY backstop)
- Removed the proactive scheduler-tick auto-install -- user explicitly chooses now
